description: Italian telemedicine platform enabling secure communication between doctors and patients. Offers video consultations, messaging, and digital prescriptions. Used by both private and public healthcare providers.
business_model: B2B - SaaS to healthcare providers; B2C - Consultation fees
competitive_advantage: Italian market focus, regulatory compliance, established user base

varden_fit.rationale: Telemedicine infrastructure in Italy - potential partner for occupational health delivery
